## Summary

<!-- One paragraph explaining what changed and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] **Bug fix** — something broken that needs fixing
- [ ] **New feature** — something new for users
- [ ] **Documentation** — only comments or docs changed
- [ ] **Chore** — tooling, CI, dependency updates, no user-facing change

<!-- Describe what you tested. Screenshots or a short recording are required for UI changes. -->
